narrative:
German Township has 6,294 registered voters, with 52.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.7 percentage points.
